name: Change planRefs Adapter Proof Gate
purpose: Produce direct Change Kernel Evidence that create and patch adapters preserve the strict canonical planRefs contract before local persistence.

oracle.description: The fixed Change Kernel planRefs adapter proof test entrypoint must exist and exit zero.

rejects: a missing fixed Change Kernel planRefs adapter proof test entrypoint
create inputs whose malformed planRefs are silently discarded before compilation or persistence
patch inputs whose malformed planRefs are silently discarded before compilation or persistence
conflicting planRef and planRefs aliases accepted without an explicit conflict error
a Change Store record containing non-canonical planRefs after an accepted create or patch input

residualUncertainty: This proof is bounded to Change Kernel create and patch adapters and the local JSON Change Store; other transports and authenticated multi-writer persistence remain outside this Gate.
